See plugin code.js handler at comp === 'Breadcrumb' (~line 1899) and DynamicPageTitle breadcrumb injection (~line 4280).

Currently missing a buildTree handler — specs that emit Text fall through to buildSapNode and return null silently. This is a known gap fixed in the audit pass: handler added at comp === 'Text'. Title.pluginNotes: The SAP Figma library does NOT ship a standalone Title instance — sap.m.Title is an aliased reference. The plugin's SAP_KEYS maps Title → 'Label' (i.e. the SAP Label instance is reused with bold+larger font). For native renderers (toolbar title, sub-section header), the plugin uses figma.createText() with: t.fontName = { family: '72', style: 'Bold' }; t.fontSize = 16; with fill bound to sapTitleColor or sapList_TextColor. See plugin code.js handler at comp === 'Title' (~line 4629). This intentional gap means: AI specs MAY emit { component: 'Title', label: '...' } anywhere; the plugin will resolve it to a native bold text node with the correct SAP variable binding.
